query: SELECT DATABASE() as database_name, VERSION() as database_version;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT DATABASE() as database_name, VERSION() as database_version;
